lessonHeader.title: Grammar
lessonHeader.titleTranslation: Present perfect simple, present perfect continuous
lessonHeader.titleTranslation_ru: Present perfect simple, present perfect continuous

cells:
I/you/we/they **have not (haven't) learnt** ...
He/she/it **has not (hasn't) learnt** ...
cells_uz:
I/you/we/they **have not (haven't) learnt** ...
He/she/it **has not (hasn't) learnt** ...
cells_ru:
I/you/we/they **have not (haven't) learnt** ...
He/she/it **has not (hasn't) learnt** ...

cells: Situations that started in the past and are still true
_Mrs Jenkins **has been** the head teacher for three years._
cells_uz: O'tmishda boshlangan va hali ham davom etayotgan holatlar
_Missis Jenkins uch yildan beri maktab direktori **bo'lib kelmoqda**._
cells_ru: Ситуации, начавшиеся в прошлом и продолжающиеся до сих пор
_Миссис Дженкинс **является** директором школы уже три года._

cells: Completed actions at a time in the past which is not mentioned
cells_uz: Aniq vaqt ko'rsatilmagan o'tmishdagi tugallangan harakatlar
cells_ru: Завершённые действия в неуказанное время в прошлом

cells: Completed actions where the important thing is the result now
cells_uz: Muhim narsa hozirgi natija bo'lgan tugallangan harakatlar
cells_ru: Завершённые действия, где важен результат сейчас

tip.label: Helpful hints
tip.translation: Present Perfect Simple ko'pincha quyidagi so'z va iboralar bilan ishlatiladi:
tip.translation_ru: Present Perfect Simple часто используется со следующими словами и фразами:
tip.translationBottom:
Quyidagi so'z va iboralar bilan misollar:
• _for_ — _She's taught German here **for** over five years._
• _since_ — _Mr Gray has taught French here **since** 2006._
• _just_ — _We've **just** done this exercise._
• _already_ — _We've **already** done this exercise._
• _yet_ — _We haven't checked the answers **yet**._
• _ever_ — _Have you **ever** had guitar lessons?_
• _never_ — _I've **never** understood why they give us so much homework!_
• _it's the first time_ — _**It's the first time** we've watched a video in class._
tip.translationBottom_ru:
Примеры с данными словами и фразами:
• _for_ — _She's taught German here **for** over five years._
• _since_ — _Mr Gray has taught French here **since** 2006._
• _just_ — _We've **just** done this exercise._
• _already_ — _We've **already** done this exercise._
• _yet_ — _We haven't checked the answers **yet**._
• _ever_ — _Have you **ever** had guitar lessons?_
• _never_ — _I've **never** understood why they give us so much homework!_
• _it's the first time_ — _**It's the first time** we've watched a video in class._

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
• O'tmishda biror narsa **qachon** sodir bo'lganini aytmoqchi bo'lganimizda, Present Perfect ishlatmaymiz. Past Simple ishlatamiz.
✓ _I **did** my homework **last night**._

• Biror narsa hozir ham muhim yoki **hali ham** davom etayotganini aytmoqchi bo'lganimizda, Past Simple ishlatmaymiz. Present Perfect ishlatamiz.
✓ _I'**ve finished**! Can I go home now?_

• Ba'zi fe'llar noto'g'ri o'tgan zamon sifatdoshlariga ega. 182-sahifaga qarang.
tip.translation_ru:
• Когда мы хотим сказать, **когда** что-то произошло в прошлом, мы не используем Present Perfect. Мы используем Past Simple.
✓ _I **did** my homework **last night**._

• Когда мы хотим сказать, что что-то важно сейчас или **всё ещё** продолжается, мы не используем Past Simple. Мы используем Present Perfect.
✓ _I'**ve finished**! Can I go home now?_

• Некоторые глаголы имеют неправильные формы причастий прошедшего времени. См. стр. 182.

I/you/we/they **have ('ve) been studying** ...
He/she/it **has ('s) been studying** ...

I/you/we/they **have not (haven't) been studying** ...

He/she/it **has ('s) been studying** ...

cells: Actions continuing up to now or just before now

_We'**ve been doing** grammar exercises for over an hour. Can we have a break now?_
_They're having a break now because they'**ve been working** so hard._
cells_uz: Hozirgi paytgacha yoki undan sal oldin davom etayotgan harakatlar

_Biz bir soatdan ortiq grammatika mashqlari bilan **shug'ullanib kelmoqdamiz**. Hozir dam olsak bo'ladimi?_
_Ular hozir dam olishmoqda, chunki juda qattiq **ishlashgan**._
cells_ru: Действия, продолжающиеся до настоящего момента или только что прекратившиеся

_Мы **делаем** грамматические упражнения уже больше часа. Можно нам сделать перерыв?_
_Они сейчас отдыхают, потому что так усердно **работали**._

tip.label: Helpful hints
tip.translation: Present Perfect Continuous ko'pincha quyidagi so'z va iboralar bilan ishlatiladi:
tip.translation_ru: Present Perfect Continuous часто используется со следующими словами и фразами:
tip.translationBottom:
Misollar:
• _for_ — _I've been learning English **for** over three years._
• _since_ — _He's been learning Chinese **since** 2004._
• _just_ — _I've **just** been reading the school newspaper._
tip.translationBottom_ru:
Примеры:
• _for_ — _I've been learning English **for** over three years._
• _since_ — _He's been learning Chinese **since** 2004._
• _just_ — _I've **just** been reading the school newspaper._

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
• Present Perfect Simple ko'pincha harakatning **natijasini** ta'kidlaydi:
✓ _She's **written** an article for the school newspaper._ (= U yozib bo'ldi.)

• Present Perfect Continuous ko'pincha harakatning **o'zini** va unga sarflangan **vaqtni** ta'kidlaydi:
✓ _She's **been writing** an article for the school newspaper._ (= U boshlagan, lekin hali tugatmagan.)
tip.translation_ru:
• Present Perfect Simple часто подчёркивает **результат** действия:
✓ _She's **written** an article for the school newspaper._ (= Она закончила.)

• Present Perfect Continuous часто подчёркивает само **действие** и **время**, потраченное на него:
✓ _She's **been writing** an article for the school newspaper._ (= Она начала, но ещё не закончила.)
